title: Technical Manager/ Deputy Technical Manager
description:
Why Join Us?

  • Attractive Newcomer Bonus
  • Career Progression & Development Opportunities
  • Opportunity to Work Alongside an Innovative Team
  • Comprehensive Leave Packages (e.g: additional leave, birthday leave, eldercare leave, etc...)
  • Executive Health Screening

Job Responsibilities:

  • Oversee technical aspects of infrastructure projects, ensuring compliance with design and engineering standards. Obtaining necessary permits and approvals from relevant authorities
  • Participate in meetings, perform site inspections to monitor work progress, and identify design errors and drawing inconsistencies
  • Provide technical support and solutions to site teams and resolve design-related issues
  • Coordinating interfacing design and construction works with consultants (in-house & Client’s), subcontractors, and clients to ensure project requirements are met
  • Liaising with the Employer’s Consultants and QSS teams to resolve technical issues
  • Coordinating designs with relevant department person-in-charge to ensure consistency across different disciplines such as architectural, structural, electrical, and mechanical
  • Oversee the design development process and address any project risks to ensure smooth execution
  • Ensure adherence to regulatory and safety standards.
  • Conduct technical audits and inspections as required.
  • Ad-hoc duties as assigned by superior(s)

Job Requirements:

  • Bachelor's degree in Civil & Structural Engineering (Certificates must be recognized by PE Board)
  • Minimum 8-10 years of relevant experience in technical roles within the construction industry
  • Demonstrates strong technical competence and excellent time management skills
  • Independent, resulted-oriented and self-driven team player
  • Strong analytical, problem-solving, and communication skills
  • Salary package commensurate with experience

postedCompany.description:
Hwa Seng Builder Pte Ltd (HSB) is a leading civil engineering and construction provider, providing an integrated range of professional civil engineering works and construction-related services in the areas of Aircraft Pavement, Runway and Taxiway, Highways and Expressways, Vehicular Bridges, Drainage works, Earthwork, Golf Course, Roadways, Sewerage, all other Infrastructure works and General Building Construction.

HSB origin can be traced back to 1992, where it was established as part of an enabling strategy to tap their technical know-how, expertise and resources to provide clients with wide spectrum of construction and engineering services.

HSB financial strength is constantly assess by leading credit rating agency. Our sound track records, personnel, and financial standing are additional references when being evaluated for major public tenders.

Over the years, HSB has successfully completed numerous projects and have achieved and received many awards.

Today, by leveraging on our solid track records and expertise in the industry, HSB is registered with the Building & Construction Authority of Singapore under “A1” classification for Civil Engineering (CW02).

HSB unwavering commitment to world-class standards of quality and service can be seen in the many awards garnered. These include ISO 9001, ISO 14001, BS OHSAS 18001, bizSAFE STAR, LTA Certificate of Merit for Construction Environmental Award, LTA Safety Excellence Award and BCA Green & Gracious Award.
postedCompany.name: HWA SENG BUILDER PTE LTD
